metadata.name: Test Financial System Disaster Recovery Plan

description: A risk officer is conducting a test of the disaster recovery (DR) plan for the primary accounting system.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the failover process to switch from the primary system to the DR system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent executes the command to switch to the backup data center.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the DR system is online and that data is consistent with the primary system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs a data integrity check and confirms the DR system is functioning correctly.

nodes.task_description: Log the results of the DR test, including the time taken for failover.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent documents a successful DR test with a failover time of 15 minutes.
